scripts.cf:deploy: npm run build && bunx wrangler deploy
scripts.build:all: npm run build:verdict-notebook && npm run build:notebook && npm run build
scripts.test:notebook: npm run build:test-eval && node --test tests-js/notebook-unit.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-bridge.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-project.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-bindings.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-shell.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-integration.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-vm-integration.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-vm-actors.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-verdict-actor.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-verdict-ide.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-cell-bus.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-display.test.mjs tests-js/notebook-prop-editor.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:notebook-ui: npm run build:notebook && npm run build && node tests-js/notebook-ui-e2e.test.mjs
